calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Stevan Luzaich appeared by telephone for Lori Procter (Personal Representative).

Mr. Luzaich stated that he submitted a third supplement, that it breaks everything down and that he is prepared to submit on the matter. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Continued To Jun-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stevan Luzaich for Petitioner via Court Call

The Court noted it needed more information regarding request for ordinary as well as extraordinary fees, and requested proper timesheets for those services. Mr. Luzaich requested one more opportunity to submit estimate of services.

The Accounting Petition re: Fees, Final Distribution is continued to June 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-01-2019 Continued To May-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on May 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear to address the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on December 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Continued To Nov-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Luzaich appeared by telephone for Lori Procter.

Mr. Luzaich stated that the estate was kept open in order to sell the liquor license, that the sale was completed on October 8, 2018, that they have begun the process of final distribution and requested a 30-day continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to November 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that further continuances will be disfavored.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
